payload.text: Tạo cho tôi một link đăng ký giáo viên hướng dẫn, gồm 7 người, TS. TRẦN KIỀU MỸ AN, PGS.TS PHẠM VŨ PHI HỔ, TS. NGUYỄN XUÂN HỒNG, TS. TRƯƠNG TRẦN MINH NHẬT, TS. PHAN THỊ TUYẾT NGA, TS. NGUYỄN TRƯỜNG SA, PGS.TS NGUYỄN THANH TÙNG. Mỗi giáo viên chỉ cho 2 bạn đăng ký.

**Defining the Application Scope**

I'm now zeroing in on defining the application's scope for the teacher supervisor registration. My primary focus is accommodating a group of seven teachers, with a constraint that each teacher can supervise at most two students. I've begun identifying teachers, currently, TS. TRẦN KIỀU MỸ AN and PGS.TS PHẠM VŨ PHI, for inclusion.


**Expanding the Teacher Roster**

I've added five more teachers: TS. NGUYỄN XUÂN HỒNG, TS. TRƯƠNG TRẦN MINH NHẬT, TS. PHAN THỊ TUYẾT NGA, TS. NGUYỄN TRƯỜNG SA, and PGS.TS NGUYỄN THANH TÙNG, to the roster. The constraint of a maximum of two registrations per teacher remains firm. I've also solidified the tech stack: React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. The app will be a client-side SPA, and I'll use `localStorage` for state persistence.

entries.description: App metadata containing the name and description of the teacher supervisor registration application.
Main HTML entry point with Tailwind CSS and FontAwesome.
Main application component with state management and layout.
Component for displaying the list of registered students.
